textByHash.01ed36ea260ff277a51f0df2d44d984129d57709: I'm here to guard the Warrior's Guild and determine who's qualified to enter.
textByHash.072f179293d40084b354986057fa4d7024669aed: What do you expect me to do with this?
textByHash.086ed30527d94919994c8347030222abe22cc950: also have to kill fewer God Wars minions to access the generals, get more common ecumenical keys, gain access to our most expensive private God Wars rooms, receive a 50% discount on imbue rewards from the
textByHash.0c870102395bba276eac1ec70f105a1618242d5c: even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals. Plus of course, you'll get even more common ecumenical keys and access to even cheaper private God Wars rooms. And yes, I can also customize your
textByHash.0e0c272f20fe17430de1c6867a957bdde48696bb: Combat Achievements are a set of tasks for all adventurers to try and accomplish. They range from simple missions to kill various creatures, to challenges that will push you to your limits.
textByHash.1126b171d0808970900adc4c57dc9ce78697ed13: Combat Achievements are broken down into six tiers: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite, Master and Grandmaster.
textByHash.13e5d05c7198322d0c9153b009603a514b60105e: I can see that. You are clearly a very experienced adventurer. You'll be expecting your master rewards?
textByHash.18aad029329aa077b7228c9016f82ed04b29c015: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your elite rewards?
textByHash.1fef27fa020fce0951f78e243c6f6f3af30f063f: Oh, how have you been getting on?
textByHash.381015fa4964094424f5b56651f4c0b464f246d0: As you complete tasks, you'll earn points. Tasks in higher tiers give more points than easier tasks. Your rank depends on how many points you've earned.
textByHash.43bfaafa9f389aca94c87752ea7a37b66996db63: Furthermore, any Thralls you resurrect will last 100% longer. I can also customize your Slayer helmet even more.
textByHash.45ef33df00a49c4c3a1c4b601acd498926475371: I do wonder what you will do now. Good luck, adventurer.
textByHash.54d8a5db5aea753b49621c7028657a8e88c77fc9: your Dwarf multicannon can hold five extra cannonballs.
textByHash.5630362ff9ee844c5b3e79208bb6579833ed8495: Hey, I have something for you but you don't have any space for it!
textByHash.60d6914170033dc6300b971f28bb1a5ee44e5ae4: including the deadly TzHaar creatures, and have to kill even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals. Again, you'll get even more common ecumenical keys and access to even cheaper private God Wars rooms.
textByHash.6783d01afe8730f8126af355842c586b076a24cf: Nightmare Zone and Soul Wars, and gain three extra commendation points from each Pest Control game. Lastly, your Dwarf multicannon can hold 15 extra cannonballs.
textByHash.7395db8dd9234d6249846a6bf3b458b52661b174: That I am. Ghommal and I used to adventure together before we joined the Guild. It felt only right that I take over from him. It is... strange not having him around.
textByHash.78323fd4626fb0ea9ecbd4ae6e4aae31b83b19f6: You need at least 2 inventory spaces. Make some space and come back.
textByHash.7b7131637c55f43241e1c27f463bd6e7ad068bb5: I'd recommend you go kill some monsters. Come back to me when you've completed a tier or two. I'll reward you for your efforts.
textByHash.7bd659abc26e942505001c75a66384e59b50bb67: There you go. I've provided you with one of our sturdier ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining hard clues and have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks. You will
textByHash.85ff210abb68eacd603997f86d9f9bd3678261f0: from the Warrior guild and two extra commendation points from each Pest Control game. Additionally, equipping one of my sword hilts at the Barrows will prevent your prayer points from being drained and
textByHash.8608976a1c13c6b1f6dcbd0ed724d46b2b89b4f3: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your medium rewards?
textByHash.922aab487925ecd822b5d7d811714d0a9179116b: There you go. I've provided you with the most basic of our ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining easy clues, increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, bonus tokens from the
textByHash.9e174830b36e57119649248a4085d0f3f6c70834: Is this something that sounds interesting to you?
textByHash.aca3308a9536f71fa326b868fcefa6c71f540953: Whenever new tasks are added to the list, there are more points available to earn, so the threshold needed for each rank will increase. Keep completing tasks to maintain your rank!
textByHash.b1f4ce484ae62601713a149008c0b74fd9bf5b9b: Your gear is adequate, I'm impressed.
textByHash.b4a220378b5d62da50e6ed710c53b66c98565d9b: Hello, I'm Laidee. Welcome to the Warriors' Guild.
textByHash.b5edefceb1676975e1b997199499a782c52cf353: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your hard rewards?
textByHash.bc9b24edf675befe13168c5dd66ffc95fae6ae68: There you go. I've provided you with one of our fancier ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining elite clues, have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks and have a higher
textByHash.c080ae322d689731bd050ce2c85d8f5bd5bf794d: There you go. I've provided you with our most prestigious ancient sword hilt. You'll also have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, including the deadly TzHaar creatures, and have to kill
textByHash.c2e9258bf943ec0f4de343be041bc7fde20be287: Wars rooms. Furthermore, your Dwarf multicannon can hold 30 extra cannonballs and your Bracelets of slaughter or Expeditious bracelets will have a chance to fully recharge instead of breaking! I can also customize
textByHash.c40381bb3acefe8de3c4e5bca10d0d9e5fde7637: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your easy rewards?
textByHash.c8b92adc9f5529ef293d7f0903466fc02f241f49: There you go. I've provided you with one of our most prestigious ancient sword hilts, along with Ghommal's cherished lucky penny! You'll also have increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks,
textByHash.d0b43d94c95e16f82ad999725d93b72c039a55af: There you go. I've provided you with one of our more modest ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining medium clues, increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, bonus tokens
textByHash.d7a0b1b413287ba37afe7e1d08618bb75c7596ed: You don't appear to have any regular Slayer Helmets in your inventory.
textByHash.dc6a06448f864991fb895d21a3e839a7b8023bcb: You have come very far. You have earned these rewards.
textByHash.ea85324a5facbce1fc0eab4e46c22997577d9a17: chance of superior slayer creatures appearing. Plus, you'll have to kill even fewer God Wars minions to access the generals, receive even more common ecumenical keys and access to cheaper private God
textByHash.eb5535b6014e4ce2ff2589bd464f3043cbb92b3f: Warrior guild and an extra commendation point from each Pest Control game.
textByHash.f38b39bc326a93052bf5de801a4e20bf131b63a6: The purpose of these tasks is for you to grow and improve, experience all that Gielinor has to offer, and become stronger in the process.
